cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Steven could have gone to the gas station. First, we know he woke up at 7am. Then Ashley saw him at a yoga studio from 7am to 10am. So during that time, he was stretching, not at the gas station. So the gas station visit can't be between 7am and 10am. That rules out option A. Next, William saw Steven at the library from 1pm to 2pm. So during that hour, he's reading, not at the gas station. Then Jennifer saw him at the office from 2pm to 3pm. So that's another occupied time slot. Then Michael saw him at the theater from 3pm to 7pm.
